title: Chicago (area) Classes!
excerpt: So excited I will be traveling back to where I was born to teach 2 classes on June 21st. Custom items exclusive to these kits will be included! There are only a few spots left - contact Hannah's Home Accents…
body: So excited I will be traveling back to where I was born to teach 2 classes on June 21st. Custom items exclusive to these kits will be included! There are only a few spots left - contact Hannah's Home Accents in Antioch, IL (about an hour north of the city) to sign up!
